title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell presents data on the accelerating role of AI agents in software development, noting that 30% of Cursor's pull requests are fully agent-developed and enterprise code generation jumped from 15% to 75% AI-generated in one year. He argues engineers are transitioning from writing code to managing autonomous agent teams, with agents now capable of complex end-to-end tasks.
